name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append {α : Type*} (A B : List α) : (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  exact Nat.add_comm a b

name: disjoint_compl
code:
import Mathlib

theorem disjoint_compl {α : Type*} (s : Set α) : Disjoint s sᶜ := by
  rw [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
  rw [Set.inter_compl_self]

name: comp_injective
code:
import Mathlib

theorem comp_injective {α β γ : Type*} (f : β → γ) (g : α → β)
    (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
    Function.Injective (f ∘ g) := by
  exact Function.Injective.comp hf hg

name: disjoint_compl
code:
import Mathlib

theorem disjoint_compl {α : Type*} (s : Set α) : Disjoint s (sᶜ) := by
  rw [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
  rw [Set.inter_compl_self]

name: double_complement
code:
import Mathlib

theorem double_complement {α : Type*} (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: surjective_card_ge
code:
import Mathlib

theorem surjective_card_ge (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Surjective f) : n ≥ m := by
  have := Fintype.card_le_of_surjective f hf
  simpa [Fintype.card_fin] using this

name: pow_add
code:
import Mathlib

theorem my_pow_add (a b : ℕ) : 2 ^ (a + b) = 2 ^ a * 2 ^ b := by
  rw [Nat.pow_add]

name: empty_subset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem empty_subset (α : Type*) (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s :=
by apply Set.empty_subset

name: pow_two_ge_one
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_two_ge_one (n : ℕ) : 2^n >= 1 := by
  apply Nat.one_le_pow
  exact Nat.zero_lt_two

name: pow_two_ge_one
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_two_ge_one (n : ℕ) : 2^n ≥ 1 := by
  apply Nat.one_le_pow
  exact Nat.zero_lt_two

theorem empty_subset {α : Type*} (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s :=

name: disjoint_compl
code:
import Mathlib

theorem disjoint_compl {α : Type*} (s : Set α) : Disjoint s (sᶜ) := by
  rw [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
  rw [Set.inter_compl_self]

theorem test_disjoint_compl :
  ∀ (α : Type*) (s : Set α), Disjoint s (sᶜ) := by
  intro α s
  exact disjoint_compl s

  have := Fintype.card_le_of_surjective f hf

name: pow_add
code:

theorem my_pow_add (a b : ℕ) : 2^(a + b) = 2^a * 2^b := by rw [Nat.pow_add]

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type*} (A B C : Set α) (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C := by
  exact Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: infinite_primes
code:
import Mathlib

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) (h : n > 0) : ∃ p, n ≤ p ∧ Nat.Prime p := by
  apply Nat.exists_infinite_primes

name: finset_union_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] (A B : Finset α) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  exact Finset.union_comm A B

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not : ∀ (b : Bool), ¬¬b = b := by
  intro b
  cases b <;> simp

-- Alternative solution using the hint:
theorem bool_not_not_alt (b : Bool) : ¬¬b = b := by
  cases b <;> simp

-- This is theoretically the same proof, but fully explicit:
theorem bool_not_not_full : ∀ (b : Bool), (¬¬b) = b := by
  intro b
  cases b <;> simp

name: finset_union_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] (A B : Finset α) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  exact Finset.union_comm A B

theorem empty_subset_univ {α : Type*} (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s := by
  exact Set.empty_subset s

name: injective_card_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m := by
  rw [← Fintype.card_fin n, ← Fintype.card_fin m]
  apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf

name: injective_card_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Injective f) :
    n ≤ m := by
  rw [← Fintype.card_fin n, ← Fintype.card_fin m]
  apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 0 < 2^n := by
  exact (by positivity)
